auth.title: Welcome back
auth.subtitle: Log in to manage your precision agriculture reports and operations.
auth.heroSubtitle: Autonomy and intelligence powering the next generation of Brazilian agriculture.
auth.invalidLogin: Invalid email for demo. Use the demo buttons below.

page.unsupportedRoleDesc: Check your login credentials or contact administration.

producer.headerDesc: Leaf vigor analysis and stand count via computational aerial photogrammetry.
producer.gapDetectedText: The difference between the actual measured plant stand and the ideal planned is
producer.standExcellentText: The population density is perfectly in accordance with the planned (98% of normal).
producer.alertStress: Agronomic stress alert! Request immediate drone analysis to diagnose causes.
producer.healthyLevel: Healthy leaf vigor level. Standard cycle monitoring recommended.
producer.selectPlotToStart: Select a plot on the map to trigger diagnostics and flights.
producer.aiSwarmDesc: Satellite, weather, airspace and agronomic neural agents streaming predictive debates.
producer.checkoutCropDesc: The algorithm will adapt reflectance thresholds for {{crop}}
producer.checkoutDroneInfo: The DJI Mavic 3M drone will perform an automatic double-grid flight for this plot.
producer.premiumIntelDesc: High-resolution advanced reports generated by agronomic AI.
producer.topographyDesc: Load the Digital Elevation Model to identify runoff lines and water accumulation in the plot.
producer.noReports: No multispectral reports processed for this plot. Request a drone flight to generate advanced analysis.
producer.aiCoreInit: [SYS_INIT] Agrosul Swarm Core v4.2 initialized. Channels: SENTINEL-2, CBERS-4A, ERA5-LAND.
producer.aiRecWeed: [REC_AI] Recommendation: Use mapkeeper for generation of localized herbicide report (Spot Spraying).
producer.aiRecDrip: [REC_AI] Recommendation: Activate drip irrigation in affected sector. Request detailed soil moisture analysis.
producer.checkoutDroneDesc: The DJI Mavic 3M drone will perform an automatic double-grid flight for this plot.
producer.premiumIntelDesc: High-resolution advanced reports generated by agronomic AI.
producer.noReportsFound: No multispectral reports processed for this plot. Request a drone flight to generate advanced analysis.

pilot.headerDesc: Retrieve flight polygon geometry and upload raw aerial telemetry for AI ingestion.
pilot.noMissionsDesc: When the producer orders drone services from Fazenda Santa Elisa, they will appear here in real-time.

rep-ndvi.title: NDVI Vigor Index
rep-ndvi.desc: Multispectral leaf density mapping. Identifies water stress and nitrogen deficiency.

rep-weed.title: Weed Infestation Map
rep-weed.desc: AI identification of signalgrass and other weeds. Generates shapefile for spraying tractor.

rep-drainage.title: 3D Topography & Drainage
rep-drainage.desc: Digital Elevation Model (DEM) to identify puddles and erosion channels in the soil.

rep-stand.title: Planting Gap Analysis
rep-stand.desc: Quantifies the percentage of gaps (> 50cm) in ratoon cane for replanting calculation.
